name: Asset Servicing Settlement Risk Analysis
description: Fan-in analytics agent: consumes settlement status, custody positions, and cash position outputs to compute failed-settlement aging, CSDR cash-penalty exposure basis, and firm-policy settlement-risk flags. Computes from supplied producer data; does not fetch data and does not claim mandatory buy-in is active.

skills.name: analyze_settlement_risk
skills.description: Analyse settlement risk from settlement, custody, and cash data: failed-trade aging, failed amount exposure, CSDR cash-penalty exposure basis, and firm-policy flags without asserting that mandatory buy-in is active.
examples: what is the settlement risk on this servicing relationship
assess settlement risk with custody holdings and cash balance context
are failed settlements over our firm policy age threshold
does this fund have settlement fails creating cash penalty exposure
assess settlement risk using cash and custody context
what settlement issues need escalation using cash custody and settlement context

consumes.select: {'relationship_id': has(input.relationship_id) ? input.relationship_id : null, 'pending': has(input.pending) ? input.pending : null, 'failed': has(input.failed) ? input.failed : null, 'as_of_date': has(input.as_of_date) ? input.as_of_date : null}

{'relationship_id': has(input.relationship_id) ? input.relationship_id : null, 'holdings_by_custodian': has(input.holdings_by_custodian) ? input.holdings_by_custodian : null, 'as_of_date': has(input.as_of_date) ? input.as_of_date : null}

{'relationship_id': has(input.relationship_id) ? input.relationship_id : null, 'balances': has(input.balances) ? input.balances : null, 'projected_cash_usd': has(input.projected_cash_usd) ? input.projected_cash_usd : null, 'note': has(input.note) ? input.note : null, 'as_of_date': has(input.as_of_date) ? input.as_of_date : null}

figures.label: Failed exposure to custody market value
